title: Therapist for Poor Life Choices | #shorts
full_text: Brij you don't need another therapist you just tell me what your problem is I'm sick and tired of doing math I've been doing math my whole life since I was born I was doing textbooks I'm sick and tired of it I'm bored of it I never want to look at a math problem again so your problem is that you're basically thankless no that you're not feeling gratitude towards the thing that has raised you to be an intelligent person a useful member of society I'm just saying going forward I think I want to pursue Lifestyles that don't include ma what what would that lifestyle be a lifestyle of eating ramen noodles arts arts oh okay so it will be a lifestyle of living on the streets have you heard the phrase a starving artist yeah but they're not starving because they're intermittent fasting
